title: prolobus nitidulus
intro: Prolobus nitidulus, also known as Prolobus, is a plant that belongs to the family of Rubiaceae and is native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to alleviate symptoms of various ailments. Prolobus nitidulus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and expectorant properties.
